rules.rule: No compat shims, wrapper modules, aliases for retired names, migration helpers, or anticipatory code. A rename replaces every call site in the same change.

Extend the canonical owner: new tools are rows in owner tables, colors live only in config.forge.theme, keybinds only in apps/chords.nix, MCP servers only in mcp-fleet.nix. A new singleton file for an owned axis is a defect.
Shell CLIs are writeShellApplication with declared runtimeInputs, set -euo pipefail, shellcheck-clean, zero '|| true' masks, no embedded repo paths or magic values.
forge-provision emits schema-v3 JSON envelopes only; agent-facing JSON never carries socket paths, host absolute paths, or token material; every envelope change lands with its README contract row.
services/ TypeScript follows the Rasm doctrine: Effect rails, tagged faults, Config.redacted, Schema boundary decodes, typed Pulumi rows, secrets never in unredacted state outputs.
